title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED AND NINETY-THREE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2945 / 55 OG No. 35, 7309 (August 31, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2453, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED AND NINETY-THREE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item III(

f

), for the Province of Cebu, page two hundred five of Republic Act Numbered Twenty hundred and ninety-three, is hereby amended to read as follows:

III

"(

f

)

Ocana Elementary School, Carcar Construction of one additional room

P6,000.00

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

"(

fi

)

Standard shop building, Noel-type, size: 6.90 X 8-55, Carcar Construction

6,000.00â

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
